BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/CHAMPAGNE%20NOBILITY.htm#EudesVitrydied1158 as of 6/8/2016

EUDES de Vitry (-[1158]).  Châtelain de Vitry.  Comte de Rethel from [1124], de iure uxoris.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes de Vitré於1071年出生在法國阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰時，他的父親André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré6歲，母親Agnes Mortain18歲。他和Mathilde de Rethel至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1158年在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes de Vitré于1071年出生在法国阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰时，他的父亲André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré6岁，母亲Agnes Mortain18岁。他和Mathilde de Rethel至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1158年在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vitré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Rodes
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes de Vitré was born in 1071, in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, his father, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, was 6 and his mother, Agnes Mortain, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Mathilde de Rethel. He died about 1158, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes de Vitré est né en 1071, à Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, son père, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, avait 6 ans et sa mère, Agnes Mortain, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mathilde de Rethel. Il est décédé environ 1158, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes de Vitré 1071 in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré 6 und seine Mutter Agnes Mortain 18. Er hatte mit Mathilde de Rethel mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1158 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Vitré è nato il nel 1071 nel Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, aveva 6 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Mortain, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mathilde de Rethel. Morì circa 1158, nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes de Vitréが1071年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンチャンプアグネ-エト-フォンティアインで生まれた時，父André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitréは6歳，母Agnes Mortainは18歳であった。彼はMathilde de Rethelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1158年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes de Vitré(이)가 1071년 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 챔파그니-트-폰테인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré(은)는 6세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Mortain(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mathilde de Rethel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1158년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Vitré nasceu em 1071, em Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, tinha 6 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Mortain, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mathilde de Rethel. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1158, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes de Vitré родился в 1071 г. в местности чампагне-ет-фонтеин, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mortain, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mathilde de Rethel. Он умер около 1158 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes de Vitré nació en 1071, en Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, André de Vitré Seigneur de Vitré, tenía 6 años y su mamá, Agnes Mortain, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mathilde de Rethel. Murió aproximadamente 1158, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 88 años.
